tooltips.install_open_we: Install wallpaper and open in Wallpaper Engine

messages.cannot_delete_active:
These wallpapers are currently active.
Please change your wallpaper first before deleting.
messages.cannot_delete_active_single: This wallpaper is currently active in Wallpaper Engine. Please switch to a different wallpaper first, then try again.
messages.confirm_delete:
Delete this wallpaper?

The wallpaper folder will be removed from your Wallpaper Engine library permanently. This action cannot be undone.
messages.invalid_input: No valid Workshop IDs or links found.
messages.exit_with_downloads:
You have incomplete downloads or extractions.
Close the window?
messages.exit_with_downloads_only:
You have incomplete downloads.
Close the window?
messages.exit_with_extractions_only:
You have incomplete extractions.
Close the window?
messages.batch_input_placeholder:
Enter Workshop IDs and/or URLs
(space or newline separated):
messages.invalid_we_directory:
Invalid Wallpaper Engine directory.
Please select the correct folder.
messages.restart_now_question: Close the application now to apply the changes?
messages.restart_with_tasks:
You have incomplete downloads or extractions.
They will be cancelled upon closing the program.
Continue?
messages.restart_with_downloads_only:
You have incomplete downloads.
They will be cancelled upon closing the program.
Continue?
messages.restart_with_extractions_only:
You have incomplete extractions.
They will be cancelled upon closing the program.
Continue?
messages.restart_theme_message: Theme will be applied after the next launch. Close the application now?
messages.restart_debug_message: Debug mode will be applied after the next launch. Close the application now?

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.accent_hint: Highlight color used throughout the interface
settings.restart_message: Application will restart to apply changes.
settings.theme_description: Select the visual theme of the application
settings.minimize_description: Minimize the window after applying wallpaper
settings.preload_description: Preload the next workshop page in background for faster navigation
settings.save_window_state_description: Save window size and position on exit and restore on startup
settings.save_window_state_hint: Remember window size and position between sessions
settings.auto_check_updates_hint: Automatically check for application updates on startup
settings.minimize_on_apply_hint: Minimize window when applying a wallpaper
settings.preload_next_page_hint: Load the next page in the background for faster navigation
settings.auto_apply_hint: Automatically apply wallpaper after download completes
settings.auto_init_metadata_hint: Automatically fetch metadata for installed wallpapers on startup
settings.auto_apply_last_downloaded_description: Automatically apply the last wallpaper that finishes downloading
settings.auto_check_updates_description: Automatically check GitHub releases on application startup
settings.login_description: Enter your Steam credentials for authentication in the Workshop
settings.debug_description: Enable debug mode for webview testing
settings.show_id_description: Show or hide the ID section in details panel
settings.auto_init_metadata_description: Automatically fetch metadata for all wallpapers when the app starts
settings.metadata_init_hint: Fetch and cache Workshop metadata for every locally installed wallpaper.
settings.we_directory_hint: Path to your Wallpaper Engine install folder. Required for Apply / Extract and for detecting already-installed workshop items.
settings.parser_log_hint: Inspect raw HTML/JSON returned by the Steam parser
settings.steam_session_description: Log in to Steam so authenticated Workshop browsing (age-gated items) works the same as in a browser.
settings.download_account_description: Pick a Steam account used for downloading via DepotDownloaderMod. Custom credentials can be added below.
settings.steam_account_unknown: Logged in, but Steam didn't return account details — the parser may be running anonymously.
settings.custom_accounts_description: Encrypted on disk with a machine-bound key (PBKDF2 + AES-256-GCM).

info.description: This application allows you to easily download and manage Wallpaper Engine wallpapers from Steam Workshop.
info.author: psyattack

debug.no_entries: No parser responses recorded yet. Browse the workshop to populate the log.
